_note: The current site lists 200+ projects, heavily weighted toward Russian regional cinemas from the MTE Russia partnership era. This is a curated sample emphasizing variety and recognizable institutions. Confirm with the client which named clients (studios, museums, government bodies) are still comfortable being listed publicly — see open question Q-05.
